project_type: React SPA mind map application (single-file App.jsx, ~3463 lines)
build_system: Vite with React plugin, Tailwind CSS for styling
test_command: No tests exist - verify via build only
verification_instructions: Run `npm run build` to confirm no compilation/bundling errors. Visually inspect code logic for correctness.
environment_constraints: No test framework. Single-file React app (src/App.jsx is ~3463 lines). Uses localStorage for persistence. Uses lucide-react for icons. Uses Tailwind CSS classes for all styling.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md exists. Follow existing code patterns - inline Tailwind CSS, functional components with hooks, localStorage for persistence.
key_patterns: All app state is in the WorkflowApp component. State uses useState/useRef/useCallback hooks. Workspaces are stored as array in state and persisted to localStorage with 'premium-workspaces' key. Password protection uses 'nexus-password' and 'nexus-password-enabled' keys in localStorage. The activeTab state selects which workspace is shown. The sidebar has sections for import/export, view toggle, workspace list, task stats, password settings, and nodes directory. Icons come from lucide-react.
directory_structure: Single src directory with App.jsx (main component ~3463 lines), main.jsx (entry point), index.css (Tailwind directives). All application logic is in App.jsx.

existing_password_system.behavior: When passwordEnabled is true and user is not authenticated, shows a full-screen lock gate. Password is stored in plain text in localStorage. Toggle and password set UI is in the sidebar under 'Password Protection' section.

existing_workspace_system.behavior: Workspaces stored as array of {id, name, nodes, edges, groups}. activeTab points to current workspace. Workspace list shown in sidebar with add/delete/rename. Dropdown selector in header also allows switching.
